sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section II, List of Answers on Topics 48:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section II, List of Answers on Topics 48:1
items.html: There are inner GAR and ZAT even in the GAR of the degree, and engaging in the ZAT of the GAR is also permitted. (Part Two, Chapter Two, Inner Light, Item 5)
